name: fornax
description: Portable, single-purpose skills for coding agents that map, plan, review, and reason over your context, and report rather than edit.

interface.shortDescription: Portable skills that map, plan, review, and reason over your context.
interface.longDescription: Fornax is a portable skills registry for coding agents: orient, understand, design, plan, refactor, and review a codebase, plus knowledge and meta skills. Skills read, plan, and report; they hand off execution rather than editing behind your back.
